title: Neoteck Car Paint Coating Thickness Gauge Meter with Fe & NFe Probe and Blacklight LCD Display for Both Steel and Aluminum Base Metal Car 0-1500um Orange
features: 【Auto Reads Steel and Aluminum】Thickness Gauge Designed with dual technology, the non-destructive Coating Thickness Tester takes the guess work out of testing surface coatings by providing automatic recognition for both ferrous and non-ferrous substrates
【High Accuracy】Probe F With Magnetic Induction And Probe N With Eddy Current Support Range And Accuracy: 0-1500Um (3%+2Um) ,0-59.1Mil (3%+0.08Mil)
【Easy to Read Display】Paint depth thickness gauge with the large LCD display shows metal type, working mode, number, battery status, and readings either in µm or mils units

【A Useful, Versatile Meter for Many Applications】 Ideal for checking the painting and coatings: used cars paint, powder coating, anodized aluminum, bathroom fittings, bike frames, stadium seats, outdoor sheds, furniture, swing sets, cabinets and lockers, computers, appliances, and toys

【Automotive perform on used car, save money】 Sometimes body shops do a great job hiding visually everything that couldn’t tell us that the car was involved in a heavy crash. Checking car paint to make sure each panel has about the same thickness of paint on it when buying used cars. this car Thickness Gauge can be used to check automotive painting thickness to determine if the car has been in an accident before
